results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT p."Category", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY p."Category") AS "revenue_share_pct", SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM(s."Extended Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM(s."Extended Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "gross_margin_pct" FROM "Product" p JOIN "Sales" s ON p."ProductKey" = s."ProductKey" GROUP BY p."Category" ORDER BY "Category", "Sales Amount" DESC
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: column "Sales Amount" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or must be part of an aggregate function.
Either add it to the GROUP BY list, or use "ANY_VALUE(Sales Amount)" if the exact value of "Sales Amount" is not important.

LINE 1: ... Amount") AS "revenue", SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY p."Category") AS "reve...
                                                                       ^

results.question: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT p."Product", p."Category", p."Subcategory", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM(s."Extended Amount") - SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "gross_profit", ROUND((SUM(s."Extended Amount") - SUM(s."Sales Amount")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100, 2) AS "margin_pct" FROM "Product" p JOIN "Sales" s ON p."ProductKey" = s."ProductKey" GROUP BY p."Product", p."Category", p."Subcategory", s."Sales Amount" ORDER BY "Sales Amount" DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: Show revenue and units sold broken down by territory group, country, region, and fiscal year. Return columns: Group, Country, Region, Fiscal Year, revenue, units_sold. Sort by Group, Country, Region, then Fiscal Year all ascending.
results.sql: SELECT STT."Group", STT."Country", STT."Region", D."Fiscal Year", SUM(S."Sales Amount") AS revenue, SUM(S."Order Quantity") AS units_sold FROM "Sales_Territory" STT JOIN "Sales" S ON STT."SalesTerritoryKey" = S."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Date" D ON S."OrderDateKey" = D."DateKey" GROUP BY STT."Group", STT."Country", STT."Region", D."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY STT."Group", STT."Country", STT."Region", D."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT c."Customer", c."City", c."State-Province", c."Country-Region", COUNT(DISTINCT s."SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_orders, COUNT(*) AS total_line_items, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS total_units, SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS lifetime_revenue, SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS lifetime_profit FROM "Customer" c JOIN "Sales" s ON c."CustomerKey" = s."CustomerKey" WHERE c."CustomerKey" != -1 GROUP BY c."Customer", c."City", c."State-Province", c."Country-Region" ORDER BY lifetime_revenueDESCLIMIT15."Total Product Cost" ASC
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Referenced table "lifetime_revenueDESCLIMIT15" not found!
Candidate tables: "c"

LINE 1: ...", c."City", c."State-Province", c."Country-Region" ORDER BY lifetime_revenueDESCLIMIT15."Total Product Cost" ASC
                                                                        ^

results.question: For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT r."Business Type", COUNT(DISTINCT r."ResellerKey") AS reseller_count, SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue, SUM(s."Sales Amount") / COUNT(DISTINCT r."ResellerKey") AS revenue_per_reseller, SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 AS margin_pct FROM "Reseller" r JOIN "Sales" s ON r."ResellerKey" = s."ResellerKey" WHERE r."Business Type" = 'Reseller' GROUP BY r."Business Type" ORDER BY total_revenueDESC."Total Product Cost" ASC
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Referenced table "total_revenueDESC" not found!
Candidate tables: "r"

LINE 1: ... Type" = 'Reseller' GROUP BY r."Business Type" ORDER BY total_revenueDESC."Total Product Cost" ASC
                                                                   ^

results.question: Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT d."Month", d."MonthKey", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS monthly_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT s."SalesOrderLineKey") AS orders, SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold FROM "Date" d JOIN "Sales" s ON d."DateKey" = s."OrderDateKey" GROUP BY d."Month", d."MonthKey" ORDER BY d."MonthKey" ASC

results.question: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT "Category" AS Subcategory, COUNT("SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines, SUM("Sales Amount") AS revenue, SUM("Order Quantity") AS units_sold, SUM("Sales Amount") / SUM("Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit, AVG("List Price") AS avg_list_price, SUM("Extended Amount") - SUM("Sales Amount") AS gross_profit, (SUM("Extended Amount") - SUM("Sales Amount")) / SUM("Sales Amount") * 100 AS margin_pct FROM "Sales" JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey" GROUP BY "Category" ORDER BY revenueDESC."Sales Amount" DESC
results.error:
Query failed after 2 retries: Binder Error: Referenced table "revenueDESC" not found!
Candidate tables: "Product"

LINE 1: ..." = "Product"."ProductKey" GROUP BY "Category" ORDER BY revenueDESC."Sales Amount" DESC
                                                                   ^

results.question: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT SOA."Channel", P."Category", FY2022."Fiscal Year" AS prior_year, SUM(SO."Extended Amount") AS prior_revenue, FY2023."Fiscal Year" AS current_year, SUM(SO."Extended Amount") AS current_revenue, ROUND((SUM(SO."Extended Amount") - SUM(SO."Extended Amount" * LAG(1) OVER (PARTITION BY SOA."Channel", P."Category", FY2022."Fiscal Year"))), 2) AS yoy_growth_pct FROM Sales_Order_SOA_SO ORDER BY SOA."Channel", P."Category", prior_year."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: List all distinct fiscal years. Return columns: Fiscal Year. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Date"."Fiscal Year" FROM "Date" ORDER BY "Date"."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: List all distinct sales channels. Return columns: Channel. Sort by Channel ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Channel" FROM "Sales_Order" ORDER BY "Channel" ASC

results.question: List all distinct customer countries. Return columns: Country-Region. Sort by Country-Region ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Country-Region" FROM "Customer" ORDER BY "Country-Region" ASC

results.question: List all distinct reseller business types. Return columns: Business Type. Sort by Business Type ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Business Type" FROM "Reseller" ORDER BY "Business Type" ASC

results.question: List all distinct fiscal quarters. Return columns: Fiscal Quarter. Sort by Fiscal Quarter ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Fiscal Quarter" FROM "Date" ORDER BY "Fiscal Quarter" ASC

results.question: Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.
results.sql: SELECT SOA."Channel", P."Category", SUM(SO."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM(SO."Sales Amount") * 100.0 / SUM(SO."Sales Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY SOA."Channel" ORDER BY SUM(SO."Sales Amount") DESC) AS "channel_revenue_share_pct", SUM(SO."Sales Amount") * 100.0 / SUM(SO."Sales Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY SOA."Channel" ORDER BY SUM(SO."Sales Amount") DESC) AS "cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct", COUNT(DISTINCT SO."SalesOrderLineKey") AS "orders", SUM(SO."Sales Amount") - SUM(SO."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit" FROM "Sales_Order" SOA JOIN "Sales" SO ON SOA."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN "Product" P ON SO."ProductKey" = P."ProductKey" GROUP BY SOA."Channel", P."Category" ORDER BY SOA."Channel" ASC, SUM(SO."Sales Amount") DESC, P."Category" ASC

results.question: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT STT."Group", D."Fiscal Year", SO."Channel", SUM(S."Extended Amount") AS channel_revenue, SUM(S."Extended Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY STT."Group", D."Fiscal Year") AS group_year_revenue, (SUM(S."Extended Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY STT."Group", D."Fiscal Year") / SUM(S."Extended Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY STT."Group", D."Fiscal Year")) AS channel_revenue_share_pct, STT."Group", D."Fiscal Year" FROM "Sales_Territory" STT JOIN "Sales" S ON STT."SalesTerritoryKey" = S."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Date" D ON S."OrderDateKey" = D."DateKey" JOIN "Sales_Order" SO ON S."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO."SalesOrderLineKey" GROUP BY STT."Group", D."Fiscal Year", SO."Channel" ORDER BY STT."Group", D."Fiscal Year" ASC, channel_revenue_desc."Sales Amount"
